ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth Hansen appearing for petitioner. Counsel is requesting the Court to reconsider dispensing with the Peruvian authorization. Court wants a declaration from counsel in Peru stating the intestate laws in Peru. Counsel stated that has been filed. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Dave Davenport CSR# 1694. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Loos.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Continued To Mar-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth Hansen appearing for administrator. Counsel stated that there is no Will anywhere. No probate proceedings in Peru. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
